content: As I've said elsewhere, I'm thinking of Time Out Market in the Fenway (map) as our new default location.

Last night I mentioned to someone about Sunday's meetup (#boston > 2026-05 meetup) and she was like, "You meet in Brookline, right"?

To which I said, "No, we're defaulting to Time Out in the Fenway now."

The reaction was "oh!" in a positive way.

So I'm thinking it's totally worth me walking an extra 20 minutes so that we can say that we actually meet in Boston. :smile:
Plus I like Time Out. So casual. No one hassling us about how big of a table we need. And lots of good food options.
